name: Animate Dead

components.materialDescription: a drop of blood, a piece of flesh, and a pinch of bone dust

instanceAllocation.notes: Reassert-control mode can affect up to four existing undead animated with this spell, plus two more undead per slot level above 3. The separate animate-versus-reassert mode, source corpse/bones, and command/control details remain represented by separate open Animate Dead buckets.

effects.description: Choose bones or a corpse of a Medium or Small Humanoid within 10 feet to create a Skeleton or Zombie. For 24 hours, you can mentally command any Undead animated by this spell within 60 feet as a Bonus Action, issuing the same command to multiple controlled Undead; without commands they Dodge and move only to avoid harm, orders continue until complete, control stops after 24 hours unless recast before expiry, and higher slots animate or reassert control over two additional Undead per slot level above 3.

aiContext.prompt: Choose whether this casting turns bones into a Skeleton, turns a corpse into a Zombie, or reasserts control over existing Undead animated by this spell.

options.label: Animate Skeleton from Bones
options.summary: Choose a pile of bones from a Medium or Small Humanoid within 10 feet; it becomes a Skeleton under the caster's control for 24 hours.
options.notes: Higher-level slots can animate additional Undead, each from a different pile of bones or corpse.

options.label: Animate Zombie from Corpse
options.summary: Choose a corpse from a Medium or Small Humanoid within 10 feet; it becomes a Zombie under the caster's control for 24 hours.
options.notes: Higher-level slots can animate additional Undead, each from a different corpse or pile of bones.

options.label: Reassert Control
options.summary: Cast before the current 24-hour control period ends to renew control over existing Undead animated by this spell instead of animating a new one.
options.notes: A level 3 slot reasserts control over up to four existing Undead; higher slots add two more controlled Undead per slot level above 3.

modeChoice.notes: The choice determines whether the target source creates a Skeleton, creates a Zombie, or refreshes control over existing Undead from this spell.

description: Choose a pile of bones or a corpse of a Medium or Small Humanoid within range. The target becomes an Undead creature: a Skeleton if you chose bones or a Zombie if you chose a corpse. On each of your turns, you can take a Bonus Action to mentally command any creature you made with this spell if the creature is within 60 feet of you (if you control multiple creatures, you can command any of them at the same time, issuing the same command to each one). You decide what action the creature will take and where it will move on its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as to guard a chamber or corridor. If you issue no commands, the creature takes the Dodge action and moves only to avoid harm. Once given an order, the creature continues to follow it until its task is complete. The creature is under your control for 24 hours, after which it stops obeying any command you've given it. To maintain control of the creature for another 24 hours, you must cast this spell on the creature again before the current 24-hour period ends. This use of the spell reasserts your control over up to four creatures you have animated with this spell rather than animating a new creature.
higherLevels: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. You animate or reassert control over two additional Undead creatures for each spell slot level above 3. Each of the creatures must come from a different corpse or pile of bones.
